ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current ranking position of the team */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the team */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the team was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game (e.g., 20-15) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win, loss, or draw) */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team in the game */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Points conceded by the team in the game */,
  "shots_taken" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the team in the game */,
  "shots_saved" INTEGER /* Number of shots saved by the team in the game */,
  "penalties_committed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties committed by the team in the game */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Number of penalties saved by the team in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists_given" INTEGER /* Number of assists given by the player */,
  "penalties_committed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties committed by the player */,
  "penalties_saved" INTEGER /* Number of penalties saved by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of games lost by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of games drawn by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the referee in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
